title: Pige clean-room observable reference metrics
status: UI Design measurement evidence; not third-party source or production fidelity evidence

boundary.allowed_use: Measure shared layout primitives, grayscale surfaces, spacing, radii, type scale, icon geometry, motion, focus, and state hierarchy.
boundary.prohibited_use: Do not copy or redistribute third-party screenshots, CSS, JavaScript, components, fonts, icons, brand artwork, or private implementation code.
boundary.comparison_scope: Only compare semantically shared primitives. Different product content is never treated as a whole-page pixel match.

measurement_method.geometry: Inspect the first and last non-black window pixels at source scale, then divide by the declared 2x scale.
measurement_method.color: Sample flat interior pixels away from text, borders, shadows, antialiasing, and transparency edges.
measurement_method.selected_state: Sample the flat center of the selected navigation row and compare the composited result, not the alpha token alone.
measurement_method.repeatability: Source filename, source coordinates, derived logical value, Pige token, and tolerance are recorded together.

pige_only_baseline.encoding: JPEG emitted by the approved in-app browser capture surface
pige_only_baseline.use: Human visual regression and geometry review; exact color truth comes from the measured token contract above.
